Fantasy Adventure: Adventures of Puss `n Boots
synopsis: Anime adaptation of Charles Perrault fairy tale, directed by Susumu Ishizaki.

title: Tistou Midori no Oyayubi
titleNative: チスト みどりのおやゆび
synopsis: Based on the children’s novel " Tistou les pouces verts " by French author Maurice Druon. An 8 year old boy discovers he has an unusual gift, the ability to cause anything he touches with his thumbs to grow into beautiful plants. The story follows Tistou as he attempts to use his gift to make a better world.

title: Obake no Dokurou
titleNative: オバケのどくろう
synopsis: There is a back alley everybody calls the "Alley of Ghosts." Gacharico the Ghost lives there, but it is a secret that only little Miku, who's family runs the nearby candy shop, knows. While the contents of the shop's capsule machines appear to be ordinary toys, inside live a large number of ghosts, each with their own personality and ability. Today, Miku's grandmother has lost her dentures, and it is up to Miku to get them back with the help of Gacharico and the other ghosts. (Source: Official Website)

title: Araiguma Calcal-dan
titleNative: あらいぐま カルカル団
synopsis: Comedy spin-off to the Araiguma Rascal (Raccoon Rascal) anime. The story is set around five employees working hard in the lesser Tama branch of a secret society aiming for world domination called the Calcal Group: an aspirational new recruit, a polite but self-conscious superior, a modern guy with a cold attitude to everything, a hotheaded but kind senior employee and a handsome older man leading the pack. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title: Shui Naodai
titleNative: 水脑袋
synopsis: In this story, the kids are constantly forced to bury themselves into their endless homework by those giant monsters behind them. The children's brains are filled with water that can be heated by tension. If a kid is overstressed, the water in their brain would boil and produce steam, which becomes the food of the greedy monsters and the energy of the whole city. Thus, those poor children repeat their lives day after day, serving as the powerplant of their world, spending their childhood in tragic misery... Water Brain, the head is in the water. Graduation design work of the Ani7ime team of the Guangzhou Academy of Fine Arts.

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

title: Mao Yao De You Huo
titleNative: 猫妖的诱惑
synonyms: The Temptation of a Cat Demon
synopsis: A cat demon with a split personality is reincarnated with the memories of her past life. She wishes revenge on her past lover, but upon meeting him finds herself falling all over for him again. What should she do?! A female main character with no sense of moral principles, between an arrogant, abstinent man and the charming, indifferent demon king, who will she choose!

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Bibury Promotion Movie
titleNative: バイブリープロモーションムービー
synopsis: Anime director Tensho announced on Saturday that he has founded a new animation studio named Bibury Animation Studio. The studio is named after the town of Bibury in England. The studio opened a website, which is streaming an original promotional video for the studio. (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: The comedy shorts follow four girls who are members of the Luck Logic Club, whose activity is playing the Luck & Logic card game. Watashitachi, Luck Logic-bu! will air approximately one minute before each episode of the main series.

title: #COMPASS2.0 ANIMATION PROJECT
titleNative: #コンパス2.0 戦闘摂理解析システム
synopsis: In the combat providence analysis system, “COMPASS2.0,” heroes gather alongside human partners in a dreamlike space. The heroes have to keep fighting to produce enough energy to keep the system running. One hero named 13 is a troublemaker who refuses to find a partner. When 13 is nearly kicked out, a new player named Jin agrees to join him. Can they bring peace to the world of #COMPASS2.0? (Source: Crunchyroll) Note: A new animation project based on the #Compass Sentou Setsuri Kaiseki System game, announced at the sixth #Compass fes.

title: Kudan
titleNative: クダン
synopsis: As oppose to the mythological creature Minotaur, a monsters of western culture, a Japanese monster Kudan has a human head and the body of cow. Kudan is born from female cow. It speaks human language, predicts significant incidents such as war or disaster and dies in three days. This story is about a man who is accidentally transformed into a Kudan. (Source: Official website)

title: McDull: Gushi
titleNative: 麦兜故事
synopsis: McDull is not the brightest kid on the block, but he continually tries to do his best and please his mother. Although it seems that he may not be destined for great things in life as his mother wishes, McDull never gives up. The story focuses on several tales about McDull and his childhood. This is told as a narrative reflection of a now adult McDull. These tales muddle up in imaginative uses of Cantonese and heaps of local Hong Kong culture. From tales about a turkey dinner to dreams of following in Lee Lai-shan's footsteps, McDull faces ebbs and flows with his demanding but devoted mother. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: WONDER EGG PRIORITY: My Priority
titleNative: ワンダーエッグ・プライオリティ 特別編
synopsis: Special episode concluding the story of Wonder Egg Priority .

titleNative: とらどら！亜美モノマネ１５０連発！！
synopsis: Scene left out of episode 6 of the main series, later released as a bonus on the Toradora PSP Super Premium DVD Box.

title: Fleeting Dream
titleNative: 玉響の夢
synopsis: A girl is informed by her doctor that she is pregnant. Surprised by the unexpected announcement, she falls into an anguish. She floats between hallucinations and delusions. The fleeting dream is a despairing dream. 1st Year Work 2011 by Mayuko Yamakita, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Pregnancy
tags.description: Features pregnant female characters or discusses the topic of pregnancy.

title: Dawn Of The World
titleNative: 末日曙光
synopsis: In the year of 2013, the tide of zombies outbreak exploded in everyone's homeland, humanity launches a large-scale battle in the endless nights awaiting for the arrival of the dawn. The end is approaching, is there going to be a way out for them? Their faiths were shattered into pieces and buried in ashes in the raging fire. But within the blazing fire, a newborn hope arise once again.

tags.name: Zombie
tags.description: Prominently features reanimated corpses which often prey on live humans and turn them into zombies.

title: Futsal Boys!!!!!
titleNative: フットサルボーイズ!!!!!
synopsis: For the past 10-odd years, futsal has been booming across the world. After watching Tokinari Tennoji represent Japan in the U-18 World Cup, Haru Yamato aspires to be a player like him. He joins the Koyo Gakuen Futsal Club where he meets teammates Seiichiro Sakaki, a loner who refuses to pass the ball to anyone, and Toi Tsukioka, who is burdened by a past that nearly made him quit futsal for good. (Source: Funimation)

title: Between the Sky and Sea
titleNative: ソラとウミのアイダ
synonyms: The Space Between the Sky and the Sea
synopsis: The story is set in Onomichi, Hiroshima in the year 20XX. Fish disappear from the sea around the world and only whales live in the ocean. The Ministry of Fishery decides to set up giant experimental Universe Fish Tanks in space. The Onomichi Universe Fishery Union is established and begins to train space fishermen. Female fishermen are in demand due to the strengthening of an equal employment law for men and women. Six new female space fishermen are selected, and the story centers on supporting their growth. (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: The opening animation (and promotional video) to Rara Maji, a school girls' RPG with music, magic, and engaging stories. The game is a co-production between Wright Flyer Studios and A-1 Pictures, the latter also animated the video. (Source: Official site)
